creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 207351
Patch to update the port to 1.9.3

Update port to Gitea 1.9.3.

Gitea 1.9.2 fixes ten bugs, and includes one enhancement. Importantly, it fixes accessing a private Gitea-hosted repo with go get.

Release notes: https://blog.gitea.io/2019/09/gitea-1.9.3-is-released/
